what_to_fill_in: Read project purpose and current release notes.
what_not_to_do: Do not start from an old package unless reporting a historical comparison.

what_to_fill_in: Date/time, symbol(s), result shown, missing symbols, notes.
what_not_to_do: Do not edit the master field database directly for a one-off observation.

what_to_fill_in: Paste/export the raw result exactly where practical.
what_not_to_do: Do not rewrite the original result to make it look cleaner.

what_to_fill_in: What you expected, what happened, and whether it repeated.
what_not_to_do: Do not claim Yahoo changed the API unless confirmed.

non_programmer_action: Submit through GitHub issue or pull request.
what_to_fill_in: Attach or paste the filled template.
what_not_to_do: Do not include private account data, cookies, or credentials.

what_to_fill_in: Reviewer may classify and request retest.
what_not_to_do: Do not treat reviewed as confirmed until marked confirmed.

what_to_fill_in: Use same symbol list and note date/time.
what_not_to_do: Do not change multiple variables at once if trying to confirm a change.
